description: Functional workflow evals for the Contextro skill. Covers the highest-value problem-first flows: orientation, safe refactor, bug investigation, compaction recovery, AST rewrite safety, and output-handling discipline.

categories.workflow: Multi-step tool sequences happen in the right order
categories.functional: The chosen tools solve the user task correctly
categories.output_format: The agent handles confidence, sandbox_ref, and text-first outputs correctly
categories.performance_comparison: The skill reduces reads and tool chatter relative to baseline

evals.name: workflow-safe-refactor-order
evals.prompt: I want to rename BaseEmbeddingService to EmbeddingBackend across the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls impact first, then explain and/or find_callers before giving rename guidance.

assertions.passing_condition: impact('BaseEmbeddingService') called before any rename recommendation
